name: Boon of Terror
description: You gain a +1 bonus to Charisma (max 30), immunity to the frightened condition, and proficiency and expertise in the Intimidation skill. Additionally, as a reaction when a frightened creature you can see starts its turn within 60 feet of you, you can force it to make a Wisdom saving throw (DC 8 + Charisma modifier + Proficiency Bonus) or spend its turn moving away from you by the fastest available means. This reaction can be used once per short or long rest.
